products.name: Eccosorb™
products.descriptor: Ruggedized military/aerospace microwave absorber family for free space and cavity resonance

evidence.snippet:
### Ruggedized Specialty Microwave and Custom Magnetic Absorbers
Match the military’s reliability, ruggedness. High performance and enhanced survivability are goals of our custom military/aerospace absorbers. Rugged offerings from the Eccosorb and Q-Zorb lines reduce free space reflectivity and cavity resonance.
[Learn more](/products/absorbers/ruggedized-specialty-microwave-and-custom-magnetic-absorbers)

*   [Eccosorb™ SLJ](/products/absorbers/ruggedized-specialty-microwave-and-custom-magnetic-absorbers/eccosorb-slj)
            The Laird™ Eccosorb™ SLJ sheet is a dual-band nitrile rubber absorber sheet designed to have minimum reflection at 2 frequency bands i.e. X- and Ku bands.

products.name: Q-Zorb™

evidence.snippet:
### Ruggedized Specialty Microwave and Custom Magnetic Absorbers
Match the military’s reliability, ruggedness. High performance and enhanced survivability are goals of our custom military/aerospace absorbers. Rugged offerings from the Eccosorb and Q-Zorb lines reduce free space reflectivity and cavity resonance.

products.name: CoolZorb™
products.descriptor: Compressible pad combining thermal transfer and microwave absorber in one material

evidence.snippet:
##### CoolZorb
Homogeneous compressible pad material providing thermal transfer and microwave absorber capabilities in one.
[Learn more](/products/multi-function-solutions-mfs/specialty-tim/coolzorb)

products.name: RobZorb™
products.descriptor: Robotically dispensable RF absorber silicone targeting 18–35 GHz band

evidence.snippet:
*   *   [Robzorb™ GDS](/products/absorbers/dispensable-absorbers/robzorb-gds)
            Robzorb™ GDS grade is robotically self levelling dispensable absorber silicone targeting 18-35 GHz band featuring high capacity process.

RF absorbing and electro-magnetically enhanced die-cast, stamped, deep-drawn precision metal parts to reduce high frequency noise or cavity resonance at board level (e.g. board level shields and RF absorber Eccosorb™) or subassembly level (e.g. diecast heatsinks with dispensable RF absorber RobZorb™).

products.name: Tflex™ SF16
products.descriptor: Non-silicone gap filler pad with 16 W/mK thermal conductivity and ultra-low hardness

evidence.snippet:
Tflex™ SF16
High thermal performance with exceptionally low hardness

Tflex™ SF16 gap filler delivers industry-leading 16 W/mK thermal conductivity in a non-silicone based formulation, offering design engineers thermal performance without compromising component protection or reliability.

products.name: Tflex™ HR 6.5
products.descriptor: 6.5 W/mK thermal gap filler pad with superior spring-back vibration resistance

evidence.snippet:
Tflex™ HR 6.5
A 6.5 w/mK thermal pad with superior spring back vibration resistance

products.name: Form in Place (FIP) Elastomers
products.descriptor: Molded-in-place EMI gaskets with 85–100 dB shielding effectiveness up to 10 GHz

evidence.snippet:
### Form in Place (FIP) Elastomers
Optimize electronic performance. Ensure reliable protection for compartmentalized cast or plastic enclosures or electronic assemblies with cost-saving, molded form-in-place gaskets. Benefit from shielding effectiveness of 85-100 dB up to 10 GHz.
[Learn more](/products/enclosure-level-emi-shielding/form-in-place-fip-elastomers)

products.name: Microwave Absorbing Gap Fillers
products.descriptor: Hybrid RF-absorbing/thermal gap filler pads for board-level EMI reduction

evidence.snippet:
### Microwave Absorbing Gap Fillers
Soft hybrid absorbers in board interfaces lower EMI, coupling while absorbing tolerances stack up without stressing components and structure, and can speed compliance. They operate between -40°C - 175°C and act as a board level shield.
